value.found_quote:
Global Wildcard Syntax (
*
):
Across all supported action types (e.g.,
read_file(*)
,
command(*)
,
mcp(*)
), passing the global wildcard
*
matches all targets within that entire action namespace.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the Global Wildcard Syntax (*) as part of Google Antigravity's permission engine, applicable across all supported action types. It is presented as a current feature with no indication of preview or deprecation.
